data.description:
Add an atomic `idea` command on all three surfaces (CLI, MCP, library) that creates
an `epic` in status `idea` in a single genesis CREATE event.

## Why

Capturing an idea must be one race-free operation. A create-then-transition path
would momentarily leave the ticket in `open` (claimable by a parallel agent, the
anti-pattern `claim` already forbids), so the idea must be born in `idea` via a
single CREATE event. The command is intentionally light: title plus an optional
description only.

## What

- Have `process_create` honor an optional `status` on the CREATE event, defaulting
  to `open` when absent ‚Äî completing the one CREATE field the reducer does not
  currently read. The `idea` command is the sole producer of a non-`open` genesis
  status; no general `create --status` flag is added.
- Add the CLI command `rebar idea "<title>" [--description=‚Ä¶]` creating an `epic`
  in status `idea`.
- Add the MCP write tool `create_idea` with the same behavior.
- Add the library entry point `rebar.idea(...)` with the same behavior.
- Suppress the create-time "non-bug ticket lacks file_impact" stderr warning for
  idea-created epics.
- Document `rebar idea` / `create_idea` / `rebar.idea` in the command/tool
  references and note in `docs/event-schema.md` that a CREATE event may carry
  `status`.

## Scope

- `src/rebar/reducer/_processors.py` ‚Äî `process_create` honors optional `status`.
- `src/rebar/_commands/idea.py` ‚Äî new atomic CLI command.
- `src/rebar/__init__.py` ‚Äî `rebar.idea(...)` library entry point.
- `src/rebar/_mcp_writes.py` ‚Äî `create_idea` MCP write tool.
- `docs/event-schema.md` and command/tool reference docs.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `process_create` sets `status` from the CREATE event data when present.
- [ ] `process_create` defaults `status` to `open` when the CREATE event omits it.
- [ ] `rebar idea "<title>"` creates a ticket of type `epic`.
- [ ] The ticket created by `rebar idea` has status `idea`.
- [ ] The ticket created by `rebar idea` is produced by a single CREATE event with
      no intervening STATUS event (test inspects the event log).
- [ ] `rebar idea "<title>" --description=TEXT` records TEXT as the description.
- [ ] The MCP `create_idea` tool creates an `epic` in status `idea` in one CREATE
      event.
- [ ] The library `rebar.idea(...)` creates an `epic` in status `idea` in one
      CREATE event.
- [ ] No surface gains a general `create --status` flag.
- [ ] The create-time file_impact stderr warning does not fire for a ticket created
      by `rebar idea`.
- [ ] `docs/event-schema.md` states that a CREATE event may carry `status`.
- [ ] The command/tool reference lists `rebar idea`, `create_idea`, and
      `rebar.idea`.
- [ ] `make lint` passes for the changed files.
data.title: Add atomic 'idea' command (CLI/MCP/library) creating an epic in status idea
